title: ECharts Segment 07
summary: This segment covers ECharts PRs #16187-#17213 (67 PRs across 13 dependency layers). It includes major branch merges that synchronize master/next, numerous chart-type bug fixes (graph cursor, heatmap borderRadius, line rendering, tree layout, pie cleanup), component improvements (tooltip stability, toolbox features, visualMap, legend, marker state), animation/transition refactoring (basicTransition rename, universal transition fixes), core infrastructure updates (echarts.ts version bumps, i18n locale additions), and utility/data layer fixes (DataStore, format, time, types).
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: This segment covers ECharts PRs #16187-#17213 (67 PRs across 13 dependency layers). It includes major branch merges that synchronize master/next, numerous chart-type bug fixes (graph cursor, heatmap borderRadius, line rendering, tree layout, pie cleanup), component improvements (tooltip stability, toolbox features, visualMap, legend, marker state), animation/transition refactoring (basicTransition rename, universal transition fixes), core infrastructure updates (echarts.ts version bumps, i18n locale additions), and utility/data layer fixes (DataStore, format, time, types).

nodes.label: Graph & Tree Chart Series
nodes.description: Graph and tree chart implementations. PRs fix graph cursor priority, autocurveness types, circular layout helpers, draggable node behavior, roam actions, and tree single-root rendering, radial layout, and symbol callbacks.

nodes.label: Line, Pie, Heatmap & Sunburst Series
nodes.description: Line chart (LTTB NaN gap preservation, area polygon rendering, ordinal null fixes), pie chart (unused code removal, PieView fixes), heatmap (borderRadius feature, fractional DPR gap fixes), and sunburst (SunburstPiece updates). Multiple PRs touch these for bug fixes and the merge commits.

nodes.label: Miscellaneous Chart Series
nodes.description: Bar chart (PictorialBar option types, valueLineWidth zero fix), gauge (zero roundCap progress fix), effect scatter, helper utilities (EffectLine memory leak, Symbol draw), and other series types (funnel, radar, parallel, themeRiver, treemap, lines, candlestick) that receive minor type fixes and merge integration.

nodes.label: UI Components
nodes.description: Tooltip (click stability, enterable legend tooltip), toolbox (DataView, SaveAsImage, ToolboxView), visualMap (piecewise selectedMode boolean, ContinuousView), legend (decal none fix), marker (MarkArea display filter, MarkLine label, state restore blur), graphic (option preservation, cursor support), dataZoom (borderColor, null layout), axis (label index events), and helper (RoamController, MapDraw).

nodes.label: Core Framework & Model Layer
nodes.description: The core echarts.ts entry point (version bumps, JPEG export type support, merge integrations), model layer (Global, Model, mixin/dataFormat, mixin/textStyle, Series), and view layer (Chart.ts, Component.ts). Touched by 12+ PRs mostly through merge commits and direct fixes like graphic option preservation.

nodes.label: Utilities & Type Definitions
nodes.description: Shared utility functions and type definitions. PRs fix quarter formatting, time utilities, format helpers, states management, graphic utilities, types.ts expansions, and dataStack processor. Heavily touched by merge PRs and type-safety improvements.

nodes.label: Animation & Transition System
nodes.description: Animation framework including universalTransition, basicTransition (renamed from basicTrasition typo fix), customGraphicKeyframeAnimation, customGraphicTransition, and morphTransitionHelper. The major PR #17193 refactors the transition file naming.

nodes.label: Data Layer
nodes.description: Data management including DataStore (invalid typo fix, layer-5 improvements), helper/sourceManager, and related data infrastructure. PRs fix DataStore issues and are integrated through merge commits.

nodes.label: Coordinate Systems & Scales
nodes.description: Coordinate system implementations (cartesian Grid, geo, radar, View.ts, axisAlignTicks) and scale classes (Ordinal null line rendering fix). PRs add geo dataToPoint fixes, roam action improvements, and RadiusAxisView enhancements.

nodes.label: Internationalization & Build Infrastructure
nodes.description: Internationalization locale files (Korean langKO additions, Italian/Romanian i18n), build infrastructure (pre-publish scripts, source-release templates, KEYS file), and related project configuration (.asf.yaml). Heavily involved in merge PRs.

edges.label: chart series depend on core echarts and model registration
graph/tree use shared types and roam utilities
graph series interacts with RoamController and legend
chart series consume data from DataStore
bar/gauge/helper series depend on core framework
chart helpers use shared utility functions and types
components extend base Component model/view classes
components use shared state management and formatting utilities
axis/visualMap components interact with coordinate systems
animation system integrated into core echarts lifecycle
data layer uses utility functions for processing
locale registrations go through core echarts
